input: Past 7 days: gait speed and stride length within this resident's usual range; no near-stumble events logged.
Past 7 days: gait speed about 8% below this resident's established baseline; no near-stumble events; slightly longer sit-to-stand time.
Past 7 days: gait speed 22% below baseline; three near-stumble events logged overnight; markedly longer sit-to-stand time.
Past 24 hours: gait speed 35% below baseline; five near-stumble events; a prolonged period of no detected movement followed by an unsteady transfer.
Past 7 days: gait speed 15% below baseline; one near-stumble event; longer sit-to-stand time on most days.
Past 7 days: metrics within this resident's usual range; one slightly longer sit-to-stand reading on a single day.
Past 7 days: intermittent sensor dropouts; partial data shows mixed readings that neither clearly match nor clearly depart from baseline.
Past 7 days: all metrics within this resident's usual range; complete sensor coverage; no events.
Past 7 days: conflicting signals - improved gait speed but more frequent near-stumble events; recent change of footwear noted by staff.
Past 7 days: gait speed about 10% below baseline; occasional longer sit-to-stand time.
